title: loqui configuration
description: Engine and model settings. File paths, locales, and namespace are supplied per-run via CLI args or the programmatic API.

model.description: Model name for the selected engine. Accepts any string.

from.description: Default source locale. Can be overridden per run.

to.description: Default target locales. Can be overridden per run.

context.description: Domain context injected into prompts to improve accuracy.
examples: a workforce scheduling app used by hospital shift managers

placeholderPatterns.description: Extra regex patterns (as strings) for tokens to preserve through translation. Applied before built-ins: {{...}}, ${...}, {var}, ICU blocks, HTML tags.
